embed.title: !unregister
embed.description: Permanently delete your account and every tracking rule you have. This cannot be undone.

fields.name: Usage
fields.value: `{{prefix}}unregister` — deletes you. You'll have to `{{prefix}}poracle` again from scratch if you change your mind.

fields.name: Softer alternative
fields.value: If you just want alerts to stop for a while, use `{{prefix}}stop` instead — your tracking rules are preserved and `{{prefix}}start` brings them all back.
